card_description: Zeus is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Zeus. Context: "Dick explores the "erotic" nature of divine possession, equating the Holy Spirit with the "Yang" that impregnates the human "Yin."
